creator: schaecsn@gmx.net
text:
xosview crashes after some days on sparc64. It does not crash on i386. That happens repeatedly.

How-To-Repeat: freebsd:~$ time xosview   
Warning:  meter SwapMeter had a negative value of -245760.000000 for field 1
Warning:  meter SwapMeter had a negative value of -229376.000000 for field 1
Warning:  meter SwapMeter had a negative value of -245760.000000 for field 1
Warning:  meter SwapMeter had a negative value of -245760.000000 for field 1
Future warnings from the SwapMeter meter will not be displayed.
Killed: 9

real    14297m26.886s
user    113m33.156s
sys     1999m38.501s
